name: Recycle
effect: Activate the effect of any regular consumable item that you've used this scene (Berries, Seeds, Type Gems and Wonder Orbs). Items that are normally consumed immediately or as a reaction remain 'active' on the User until their activation conditions are met (ex: Type Gems, Damage Reduction Berries). An Item may not be recycled more than 5 times.
description: One Pokemon's trash is another one's treasure.
